positive: A maximalist, highly detailed mystical emblem featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling vibrant bioluminescent jungle flora. The central composition should be symmetrical and framed within an ornate circular medallion, suitable for an apparel print. Use a color palette dominated by deep sapphire blue, rich emerald green, and striking metallic gold accents. The style should blend ethereal watercolor washes with crisp, clean geometric linework and strong contrast. Emphasize glowing stardust trails and intricate, elegant botanical details (vines, lotus flowers). High resolution, vector illustration aesthetic, perfect silhouette, central focus, deep depth of field, high contrast, mystical, celestial, fantasy art.
negative: blurry, deformed, low resolution, worst quality, jpeg artifacts, noisy, text, watermark, signature, cropped, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, cartoon, childish, dirty
